states.when_to_use: Use this card when A new outgoing message is required and no compose window is open yet.
states.when_not_to_use: Do not use this card if the current Thunderbird surface does not match the visible cues or if the task is already past this state.
visible_cues: New Message button in Thunderbird mail toolbar
states.verification_cue: Click New Message to open the composer on the current mail account.
